brand_colors.accent: Warm Cream / Beige (used in regional/cultural ads)

brand_design_system.brand_logo_placement: Consistently top-center or top-left in every ad — orange rounded square icon + wordmark + tagline
brand_design_system.brand_tagline_treatment: Always present below logo, small size, consistent across all 5 ads
brand_design_system.design_system_consistency: Very high — all 5 ads share the same logo, typeface family, color system, and layout logic

ads.style: Immersive Food Photography with Price Offer Overlay

design_language.overall_aesthetic: Warm, appetizing, premium food photography within strong brand-colored environment
design_language.visual_approach: Full-bleed brand-colored background with hero food photography floating on a surface — text overlaid cleanly above
design_language.composition_technique: Top-third reserved for brand + offer text; bottom two-thirds for food photography on wooden surface

color_logic.text_color: White for headline; Orange for price (inside white circle)
color_logic.food_image_tones: Warm reds, browns, creams — harmonize naturally with orange background
color_logic.background_treatment: Solid orange gradient — darker at edges, lighter center, creates depth
color_logic.color_harmony: Monochromatic orange family — food colors act as natural complements
color_logic.overall_effect: Everything feels warm, unified, on-brand — orange background makes food look even more appetizing

typography.special_typographic_treatment: Price enclosed in a white circular ring/halo — draws eye, creates visual focal point
typography.text_color_logic: White text on orange background — maximum contrast

text_placement.offer_headline: Upper-center, above the circular price element
text_placement.price_element: Center frame, inside white circular graphic — bridges text zone and food zone
text_placement.relationship_to_image: Text occupies upper 40% of frame; food occupies lower 60%

image_and_graphic_placement.hero_food_image: Bottom 60% of frame — pav bhaji on wooden tray, shot from slightly elevated angle
image_and_graphic_placement.image_position: Center-bottom, food extends toward edges naturally
image_and_graphic_placement.image_treatment: Realistic appetizing food photography, warm lighting, steam visible
image_and_graphic_placement.graphic_elements: White circular ring around price — only graphic element besides logo
image_and_graphic_placement.surface_detail: Wooden table visible — adds warmth and tactile realism
image_and_graphic_placement.layering_order: Orange background → food photography → text and price graphic overlaid

message_delivery.primary_message: Great food available at very low price
message_delivery.strategy: Price anchoring — big number, low value creates instant value perception
message_delivery.cta: Implicit — price is the call to order

ads.style: Regional Cultural + Multi-product Spread with Illustrated Background

design_language.overall_aesthetic: Warm cultural celebration — regional Indian city targeting with illustrative identity marker
design_language.visual_approach: Two-zone vertical split — top branded orange header bar; bottom large cream/beige content area with food spread and cultural illustration
design_language.composition_technique: Hard horizontal split between brand zone (top) and content zone (bottom); multiple food items arranged in a spread/flat-lay overhead composition

color_logic.dominant_color_zone_2: Warm Cream / Parchment Beige — main content area
color_logic.accent_graphic_color: Warm amber/brown — illustrated monument and cultural badge
color_logic.cultural_badge_colors: Orange and dark brown — regional identity marker bottom right
color_logic.food_image_tones: Full natural color spectrum — diverse food items each with own color signature
color_logic.overall_effect: Cream background feels traditional, festive, South Asian — connects culturally with target audience

typography.primary_typeface_style: Bold rounded sans-serif (consistent with brand system)
text_sizes: Brand name — medium in orange bar
typography.special_typographic_treatment: Discount percentage in larger bold acts as primary visual anchor in text zone
typography.text_color_logic: Dark text on cream — traditional, readable

text_placement.logo_and_tagline: Top center within orange header band
text_placement.cultural_badge: Bottom right corner — city identifier graphic
text_placement.relationship_to_image: Text in upper 25% of content zone; food spread occupies lower 75%

image_and_graphic_placement.hero_food_spread: Large central area — multiple dishes arranged in semi-circular overhead spread
image_and_graphic_placement.food_items_count: 8-10 different food items representing regional variety
image_and_graphic_placement.illustrated_background: Faint line illustration of Indian monument/architecture — watermark style behind food
image_and_graphic_placement.cultural_badge_graphic: Bottom right — illustrated badge with regional city name and local greeting
image_and_graphic_placement.image_treatment: Studio food photography composited on cream background
image_and_graphic_placement.layering_order: Cream background → faint monument illustration → food photography → text overlays → cultural badge

message_delivery.primary_message: Massive discount on local city-specific food options
message_delivery.emotional_trigger: Local pride, mood uplift, savings excitement

ads.style: Dark Minimal Photography with Bold Text Block

design_language.overall_aesthetic: Dark, moody, premium food photography — editorial contrast with bold white text
design_language.visual_approach: White top header zone for brand; dark full-bleed food photography for body; bold white text block overlaid on dark image
design_language.composition_technique: Hard two-zone split — clean white top, dark cinematic food image bottom; text overlaid directly on dark image for maximum contrast

color_logic.dominant_color_zone_2: Dark charcoal/moody grey — food photography background
color_logic.text_on_dark_zone: White — maximum contrast on dark background
color_logic.food_image_tones: Golden browns (samosas), green garnish, warm amber (chai) — natural food colors pop against dark bg
color_logic.overall_effect: Dark background makes food colors pop dramatically — samosas look golden and crispy

typography.primary_typeface_style: Bold rounded sans-serif — consistent brand font
text_sizes: Brand name — medium in white zone
typography.special_typographic_treatment: Black filled rectangle behind white headline text — ensures readability over complex food image
typography.text_color_logic: White text on solid dark/black panel — clean, editorial

text_placement.headline_block: Upper portion of dark image zone — dark background panel with white text sits at top of food image
text_placement.relationship_to_image: Text occupies upper 35% of dark zone; food fills full dark zone including behind text

image_and_graphic_placement.hero_food_image: Full-bleed dark background food photography — samosas in basket, chai glasses, chutneys
image_and_graphic_placement.image_treatment: Dark moody studio photography — high contrast, dramatic lighting on food
image_and_graphic_placement.layering_order: White header zone → Dark food image (full bleed below) → Dark text panel overlay on image → White text on panel

message_delivery.primary_message: City-specific food discovery with top deals
message_delivery.strategy: Local greeting + aspirational mood language + premium food visual
message_delivery.sophistication_level: Medium-high — most visually elevated of the 5 ads

ads.format: Horizontal / Landscape (16:9 ratio) — Facebook Feed banner format
ads.style: Clean Brand-colored Landscape with Side-by-side Text and Product

design_language.overall_aesthetic: Clean, bright, brand-dominant — orange canvas with food as right-side anchor
design_language.tone: Simple, direct, warm — comfort food positioning
design_language.visual_approach: Left half — brand, text, price on orange; Right half — food photography bleeds in from right edge
design_language.composition_technique: Left-right split composition — text on brand-colored left, food photography on right; horizontal format maximizes real estate for both

color_logic.dominant_color: Swiggy Orange — fills majority of frame (left two-thirds)
color_logic.text_color: White for all text on orange
color_logic.food_image_tones: Warm neutrals — rice, roti, dal, curry in earthy tones harmonize with orange
color_logic.cutlery_element: White spoon graphic bottom left — adds lifestyle context
color_logic.overall_effect: Orange-dominant landscape feels energetic, brand-strong; food on right creates natural appetite pull

text_sizes: Fine print — very small bottom right
typography.special_typographic_treatment: Price (₹99) rendered in very large scale — becomes a visual graphic element, not just text
typography.text_color_logic: All white on orange — single-color text system, maximum brand cohesion

text_placement.relationship_to_image: All text on left half; food image on right half — clean separation

image_and_graphic_placement.hero_food_image: Right half of frame — thali/meal spread with multiple dishes
image_and_graphic_placement.image_treatment: Clean bright food photography on neutral surface — no dark moody treatment
image_and_graphic_placement.food_items: Complete Indian meal — rice, roti, dal, two curries on a large plate
image_and_graphic_placement.graphic_elements: White spoon icon bottom left — lifestyle prop graphic
image_and_graphic_placement.layering_order: Orange background (full bleed) → Food photography (right) → Text elements (left overlay) → Spoon graphic

message_delivery.primary_message: Complete wholesome meal at entry-level price point
message_delivery.strategy: Comfort + value — wholesome positioning at affordable price

ads.style: Dark Cinematic Food Photography with Elegant Price Communication

design_language.overall_aesthetic: Dark premium food photography — burger as hero, elegant and indulgent
design_language.tone: Bold but refined — talks to quality-conscious buyer with price surprise
design_language.visual_approach: Full-bleed dark cinematic food image; brand in white top zone; text in white over dark image; decorative gold squiggle graphic accent
design_language.composition_technique: Nearly full-bleed food photography with minimal top white strip for brand; text overlaid in upper-middle; food dominates 70%+ of frame

color_logic.dominant_color: Deep dark brown/charcoal — food photography background
color_logic.price_color: Warm cream/golden white — slightly different tone from pure white, feels premium
color_logic.accent_graphic: Gold/amber thin squiggle/ribbon line — decorative element near price
color_logic.food_image_tones: Golden sesame bun, melting orange cheese, green lettuce, red tomato — full rich burger palette
color_logic.overall_effect: Dark background makes the burger's golden cheese and warm tones look extraordinarily rich and indulgent

text_sizes: Logo — small, top center in white zone
Fine print — very small, bottom right
typography.special_typographic_treatment: Price in warm cream tone rather than pure white — subtle premium differentiation; decorative gold squiggle accompanies price

text_placement.logo_and_tagline: Top center in white strip zone
text_placement.headline: Upper-center of dark image zone — two short lines, left-ish alignment
text_placement.price: Center-upper of dark zone — largest text element, below headline
text_placement.decorative_squiggle: Right of price text — small curling gold line graphic
text_placement.relationship_to_image: Text in upper 40% of dark zone; burger occupies full frame including behind text

image_and_graphic_placement.hero_food_image: Full-bleed — burger on wooden cutting board, dark studio background
image_and_graphic_placement.image_position: Center-lower frame dominance — burger fills 60% of visual space
image_and_graphic_placement.image_treatment: Dark moody cinematic food photography — dramatic side lighting, cheese drip visible
image_and_graphic_placement.image_style: Premium editorial food photography — most aspirational of the 5 ads
image_and_graphic_placement.graphic_elements: Thin gold squiggle/ribbon — small decorative accent near price text only
image_and_graphic_placement.layering_order: Dark food photography (full bleed) → White header strip at top → Text overlays (upper zone) → Gold squiggle accent

message_delivery.primary_message: Premium indulgent burger at surprisingly affordable price
message_delivery.strategy: Quality-first visual impact followed by price reveal — subverts expectation (premium look, low price)
message_delivery.sophistication_level: High — most visually premium of the 5 Swiggy ads

consistent_design_elements: Orange rounded square logo mark — top position in every single ad
Brand wordmark + tagline always paired together
Same typeface family across all 5 ads
Price (₹99) used as primary offer anchor in 4 of 5 ads
White text as default on all dark/orange backgrounds
Food photography always realistic, appetizing, high-quality

layout_pattern_variations.regional_cultural_variant: Ad 2 — cream background, illustrated cultural elements

typography_system.typeface_character: Rounded bold sans-serif — approachable, modern, brand-consistent
typography_system.scale_logic: Price always largest text element — offer is primary message
typography_system.color_logic: White on orange OR white on dark — always maximum contrast
typography_system.hierarchy: Logo → Offer headline → Price → Supporting text → Fine print

photography_style_spectrum.consistent_quality: All 5 ads use professional studio-quality food photography

color_strategy.orange: Brand identity, energy, appetite stimulation — primary brand expression

message_delivery_pattern.universal_formula: Brand presence → Appetite trigger (food image) → Price value → Implicit CTA
message_delivery_pattern.localization_strategy: City-name targeting used in Ads 2 and 3 — hyper-local relevance
message_delivery_pattern.price_anchoring: ₹99 price point repeated across 3 ads — builds platform-wide value perception
message_delivery_pattern.emotional_range: Comfort (Ad 4) → Indulgence (Ad 5) → Local pride (Ad 2) → Pure value (Ad 1) → Discovery (Ad 3)
